content.en:
After breaking through to the emperor level, Ye Tian did not immediately leave the level, but continued to comprehend for a period of time.

After the Emperor level, the mind runs much faster, and it is easier to comprehend the mystery of the ultimate rule.

In addition, he was originally only one step away from comprehending the prototype of the Ultimate Rule Realm, and it was not difficult to cross this step now.

Really.

After a period of time, Ye Tian successfully comprehended the rudiments of the Ultimate Rule Realm, although he only mastered a little rudiment, but it also made his strength skyrocket.

Now, even if he is not invincible among the emperor level, he is definitely an almost invincible existence.

"It's time to go to the Abyss of Qinghuan and join the battle!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

"Elder Tian, congratulations on breaking through to the Emperor level, but are you really going to enter the battlefield?"

He Lao asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian replied affirmatively: "With my strength, I will not encounter any danger, and the dragon disciple tribe has given a lot of resources, I need some items, and I need to accumulate battle records." "

Seeing that Ye Tian had completely decided to go, He Lao naturally wouldn't say anything.

He could only advise: "Be careful, if you can't beat others, run away as soon as possible." "

After all, Ye 237 Tian is very important to the Eagle Ministry, and now he is the strongest person in the Eagle Ministry, and it is also the hope of the Eagle Ministry's rise, he naturally does not want Ye Tian to fall in the battle between the Dragon Disciple Tribe and the Golden God Ministry.

"I'll be careful!"

Ye Tianying said.

......

Soon, Ye Tian rushed from the Eagle Department to the Dragon Disciple Tribe, any king-level or emperor-level who participated in the war, if they wanted to enter the battlefield of Qinghuan Abyss, they needed to receive a seal, which could record how many enemies they had killed and how many records they had obtained, and according to this record, they could exchange for resources.

"That's the mark!"

Ye Tian studied this mark and found that this mark was very responsible, it was one of the branch marks of a special mark, composed of endless ultimate particles, even if he was the ultimate supreme, he couldn't understand this mark.

"It should be this kind of mark created by a peak ancient demon-level being like Plotz. "

Ye Tian guessed.

Afterwards, Ye Tian went to the battlefield of Qinghuan Abyss.

Located in a treasure trove between the Dragons and the Golden Gods, the Abyss is now a battlefield of choice for both sides (AEEB).

The endless killing aura enveloped this battlefield, which showed how tragic the slaughter of these ancient demon era times was.

Wow!!!!

Ye Tian escaped into the Qinghuan Abyss, and then began to look for other king-level and emperor-level existences.

Anyone who does not have a mark is on the side of the Golden God Department, and those who have a mark are not allowed to kill, otherwise the mark will perceive it, and will send the information back and betray the dragon tribe, the consequences will be very serious, and the tribe will be punished, and they will be hunted down and positioned, and they will not be able to escape at all.

Therefore, once you enter the war, there is no way to choose a new side.

Along.

Ye Tian sensed the existence of many kings, all of whom belonged to him.

And most of the battlefields he is in now belong to king-level existences, and the battlefield between emperors is in a more core place.

The emperor level is too lazy to kill the king level, and there is no record of any record, as long as the emperor level is killed, there are enough records.

If you kill a famous emperor, then there will be many achievements!

And according to the fame, the dragon disciple tribe has also rewarded every emperor, and if you kill the emperor level on the bounty list, you will make a lot of money.

After a while, Ye Tian came to the depths of the Qinghuan Abyss, where battles would break out all the time.

Abrupt.

An emperor-level used some kind of strange means to kill Ye Tian, without any fluctuations, and the speed was extremely fast, and his strength was not weak, at least he was in the top emperor-level ranks.

"Die!"

That emperor-level sword stabbed at him, as if it was going to penetrate Ye Tian's body directly, this was an ultimate arcane, but it was just the most ordinary but flawed ultimate arcane.

In Ye Tian's eyes, this ultimate arcane technique was too ordinary.

Dang!

This ultimate arcane technique hit Ye Tian's Aromu Armor and shattered directly, not hurting Ye Tian at all.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian slammed into the opponent's body with a punch, and with the power of the Heaven-Tearing Ultimate Arcane, he killed him with one punch.

"It's too weak, the top emperor level can't break through my defense, the top ultimate arcane effect of the armor of the Arrow Mother is really good!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And he looked at the mark on his hand, which showed the number of an Ancient Demon Era era - 200,000!

This means that he has won a record of 200,000!

Under normal circumstances, the record of killing a top king level is 5,000 points, but killing a top emperor level and obtaining a record of 200,000 is naturally a cost-effective way to kill an emperor level.

Moreover, the record of killing the top king level is the king level killing the king level, and if the emperor level kills the king level, it is estimated that the record is 1000 points.

This kind of regulation is to hope that the emperor level will desperately kill the emperor level, if the emperor level can't kill much, he can't win the war at all.

It's just that it is too difficult for a normal emperor to kill an emperor.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian used the Dapeng technique to find the emperor level of the Golden God Department.

Soon, he found an emperor-level, but it was only a medium-level emperor-level, and he easily killed it in one move, and only obtained a record of 100,000.

As time passed, one emperor level after another fell, which made the Golden God Department know about it, and it was immediately very annoyed.

......

The Golden God Department, the headquarters of the Qinghuan Abyss.

A group of emperors are here to discuss something.

"Everyone, recently, many emperors have been killed before they have time to rescue, it should be that there is a very demonic emperor-level from the dragon tribe who has come in. "

"Who is it?Emperor-level Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon, or one of the top Emperor-level of the Dragon Disciple Tribe?"

"I don't know, we have to investigate, otherwise there will be too many deaths at the emperor level, which will not be good for us!"

And just like that, another time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian attacked and killed an emperor-level, thinking that he could easily kill the opponent in seconds, but who knew that when he used the blade of the Luo Mu to attack the other party, a light curtain appeared on the opponent's body, resisting his The blade of the Luo Mu.

But this light curtain was also shattered, but it also allowed the other party to survive.

This emperor immediately called for help, and passed on the picture here.

In the next second, Ye Tian unleashed a second blow to the blade of Aromu, blasting it to death.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian searched for a stone tablet from his body, and it was the defense formed by this stone plaque that blocked his blow, but unfortunately this stone tablet was broken, and it should be useless.

At the same time, the Golden God Department knew about Ye Tian's situation, and they were extremely angry.
